scenario: technical warm-up and protected-traffic synchronization check before the loaded capture
objective: confirm AP state, UART capture path, and helper-node traffic tooling before the first L2 block
instructions: Stay outside the controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Keep the helper traffic nodes powered and reachable, but do not start the protected traffic yet.;;Verify that the future trace files will be saved into the bundle traffic/ directory before moving to E1.

scenario: extended empty reference under injected protected traffic
objective: collect the first long empty baseline while the same L2 load profile is active
instructions: Before pressing Enter, confirm the protected-traffic generator is already running and the trace collector is recording.;;Leave the controlled 2.00 m path between AP and capture node.;;Keep the room layout unchanged and avoid entering the path during the block.

scenario: extended static presence under the same injected load
objective: capture static presence while the protected traffic remains active
instructions: Keep the protected-traffic generator running continuously.;;Enter the midpoint of the controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Stand almost still and do not touch the chair, AP node, table, capture node, or helper nodes.

scenario: extended slow motion under the same injected load
objective: capture slow motion while the same L2 load profile remains active
instructions: Keep the protected-traffic generator and trace collector running.;;Stay within the same controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Move slowly back and forth without changing the topology of the stand.

scenario: extended empty recovery after the first loaded motion cycle
objective: check the reverse transition back to empty under the same L2 load
instructions: Leave the controlled path again while keeping the traffic load active.;;If the helper traffic path restarts or stalls, record that explicitly in the optional note before continuing.;;Keep the room layout unchanged.

scenario: second extended static presence under the same injected load
objective: provide an in-session repeat for static presence with matched load conditions
instructions: Confirm the protected-traffic trace is still recording before pressing Enter.;;Return to the midpoint of the controlled path and stand almost still.;;Avoid unnecessary motion not required for the block.

scenario: second extended slow motion under the same injected load
objective: provide an in-session repeat for slow motion with matched load conditions
instructions: Keep the protected-traffic generator and trace collector running.;;Stay within the same controlled path used in M1.;;Repeat the same slow motion pattern without moving helper nodes, AP node, capture node, or cables.

scenario: final extended empty recovery under the same injected load
objective: finish the loaded support set with a final empty reference and aligned traffic trace
instructions: Leave the controlled path one final time while keeping the traffic load active until the block ends.;;Stop the protected-traffic generator only after the block is finished and the capture is complete.;;Export and copy the trace files into traffic/ before finalizing the bundle.
